title: Example official task contract
objective: Validate the official task.json contract flow without calling external agents.
description: Example task used by TASK-002 to prove that directory-based task.json files are accepted by the runner.
acceptance_criteria: The runner prefers this task.json over legacy pending JSON files.
The task passes minimum contract validation.
The runner creates logs and a Markdown report.
constraints: Do not call Gemini as a subprocess.
Do not call Codex as a subprocess.
